source.scope: Official-source-backed Saint Lucia income-year 2026 individual income-tax schedule on caller-confirmed annual chargeable income through XCD 30,000.

LC.notes: Annual chargeable income through XCD 30,000 under the 10%, 15% and 20% bands. Higher chargeable income fails closed because the IRD page's published fixed amount for the 30% band does not reconcile with the preceding bands.

register.coverageSummary: Income-year 2026 individual income tax on caller-confirmed annual chargeable income through XCD 30,000.
